epics.title: Project Setup & Infrastructure
epics.description: Initialize Next.js 14 project with Supabase, deploy pipeline, shared components, and offline sync engine as foundation layer.

epics.title: Registration & Authentication
epics.description: Player self-registration (3-step wizard), email/password login, auth middleware, and role-based access control.

epics.title: Player Dashboard
epics.description: Post-login hub showing tournament info, team members, round status, and quick-access leaderboard link.

epics.title: Active Round — Shot Tracking
epics.description: Core gameplay: GPS shot capture, club selection, shot outcomes (In-Play, OOB, Mulligan, Sunk), player rotation within foursome, and offline resilience.

epics.title: Hole & Round Completion
epics.description: Detect hole completion, calculate Best Ball via Edge Function, display hole summary, and navigate through 18-hole wraparound sequence.

epics.title: Leaderboard
epics.description: Real-time team leaderboard (authenticated + public shareable URL), sponsor logo banner, Supabase Realtime subscription.

epics.title: Admin — Tournament & Course Setup
epics.description: Admin layout with sidebar, tournament configuration, hole management (par, GPS pins), and club list management.

epics.title: Admin — Player & Team Management
epics.description: Player CRUD with team assignment, team creation with starting holes, search unassigned players, auto-assign starting holes.

epics.title: Admin — Scores & Sponsors
epics.description: Score override with audit trail, Best Ball recalculation, sponsor logo upload and ordering, CSV export.

epics.title: Security & 2FA
epics.description: Phone-based 2FA enrollment, SMS OTP verification, rate limiting, session hardening. Deferred post-tournament.

stories.title: As a developer, I want the Next.js project initialized with Tailwind and shadcn/ui, so that I can build UI components rapidly.

acs.text: Next.js 14 App Router project runs with `npm run dev`
Tailwind CSS classes render correctly
shadcn/ui Button component renders without errors

stories.title: As a developer, I want Supabase configured with browser and server clients, so that I can query the database from any context.

acs.text: Browser client connects to Supabase project
Server client works in Server Components
.env.local.example documents required env vars

stories.title: As a developer, I want the database schema deployed with all tables, RLS policies, and indexes, so that the app has a complete data layer.

acs.text: All 9 tables created (tournaments, holes, players, teams, clubs, round_state, shots, scores, sponsors)
RLS policies enforce player vs admin separation
Realtime enabled on scores table
Unique constraints prevent duplicate entries

stories.title: As a developer, I want the project deployed to Vercel, so that we have a production URL for players to register.

acs.text: Production deployment accessible via public URL
Supabase env vars configured in Vercel

stories.title: As a developer, I want a Google Maps wrapper component, so that I can display holes and player positions.

acs.text: Map renders with satellite view centered on pin coordinates
Pin marker displays at hole location
Player position marker updates on GPS capture

stories.title: As a developer, I want clubs and Granite Ridge hole data seeded, so that the app has course data on first run.

acs.text: 21 clubs seeded across 5 categories
18 holes seeded with par values and approximate GPS
Tournament record created for CIBC 2026 event

stories.title: As a player, I want consistent FDgolf + AI/Run branding on every screen, so that the app feels professional.

acs.text: Full header shows "FDgolf | created by AI/Run™" with gradient icon
Compact header shows condensed branding + hole info
Dark green (#1a472a) consistent across all variants

stories.title: As a developer, I want an offline sync engine that queues all writes to localStorage, so that shots are never lost.

acs.text: Writes enqueue to localStorage regardless of connectivity
Queue flushes automatically when online
Failed writes retry up to 5 times
Offline indicator shows pending count
Online event triggers immediate flush

stories.title: As a player, I want to create an account with email and password, so that I can register for the tournament.

acs.text: Email/password form validates input (min 6 chars, matching passwords)
Supabase Auth account created on submit
Error displayed for duplicate emails

stories.title: As a player, I want to enter my profile information, so that tournament organizers know who I am.

acs.text: Form captures name, title, company, phone (required) and YOB, gender (optional)
Player record created in players table linked to auth user

stories.title: As a player, I want to link to my assigned team during registration, so that I can see my teammates.

acs.text: Team number input validates against existing teams
Teammates displayed after lookup
Player's team_id updated on registration complete

stories.title: As a player, I want to log in with my email and password, so that I can access the app.

acs.text: Email/password form authenticates via Supabase
Successful login redirects to /dashboard
Error message shown for invalid credentials

stories.title: As a developer, I want auth middleware that protects routes and redirects unauthenticated users, so that player data is secure.

acs.text: Unauthenticated users redirected to /login
Authenticated users on /login redirected to /dashboard
Admin routes check player role before access
Public /live/[slug] route accessible without auth

stories.title: As a player, I want a dashboard showing my team, tournament info, and a Start Round button, so that I have a clear home screen.

acs.text: Welcome message with player's first name
Tournament name, venue, and countdown displayed
Team number, starting hole, and teammates listed
"Start Round" button visible when tournament is active
Leaderboard link accessible from dashboard

stories.title: As a player, I want to start my round and confirm my starting hole, so that shot tracking begins correctly.

acs.text: Starting hole pre-filled from team assignment
round_state record created with status 'in_progress'
Player redirected to shot tracking screen

stories.title: As a player, I want to see a map of the current hole with the pin location, so that I know where to aim.

acs.text: Google Maps satellite view centered on current hole pin
Pin marker visible with distinct color
Map occupies top ~35% of screen on mobile

stories.title: As a player, I want to select which team member is taking the current shot, so that we can track all four players from one phone.

acs.text: Player pills show all team members
Active player highlighted in green
Completed players (hole sunk) shown with strikethrough
Tapping a pill switches active player

stories.title: As a player, I want to select my club from a grouped dropdown, so that my club choice is recorded per shot.

acs.text: Dropdown shows active clubs grouped by category (Woods, Hybrids, Irons, Wedges, Putter)
Selected club name stored on shot record

stories.title: As a player, I want to tap "Capture Shot" to record my GPS position, so that my shot location is tracked.

acs.text: GPS position captured via browser Geolocation API
Shot record written through sync engine (offline-safe)
Player pin appears on map at captured position
GPS permission requested with clear explanation

stories.title: As a player, I want to choose the outcome of my shot (In-Play, OOB, Mulligan, Sunk), so that scoring is accurate.

acs.text: Four outcome buttons displayed after shot capture
In-Play records shot and moves to next player
OOB adds +1 penalty stroke and allows rehit
Mulligan discards shot (no stroke counted)
Sunk closes hole for that player

stories.title: As a player, I want to edit a previous shot, so that I can correct mistakes.

acs.text: Shot history visible for current hole
Tapping a previous shot opens edit mode
Modified shot updates in database and recalculates sequence

stories.title: As a player, I want the hole to complete automatically when all team members have sunk, so that we can see results.

acs.text: System detects when all active players have outcome 'sunk'
Best Ball Edge Function called automatically
Hole summary screen displayed

stories.title: As a player, I want to see a hole summary with everyone's strokes and the best ball highlighted, so that we know team performance.

acs.text: Each player's stroke count displayed
Best ball score highlighted with star indicator
Score relative to par shown (birdie, bogey, etc.)

stories.title: As a player, I want to advance to the next hole with wraparound (e.g., hole 10 start → 10→18→1→9), so that the shotgun format works correctly.

acs.text: "Next Hole" button advances correctly in sequence
After hole 18, wraps to hole 1
After completing 18 holes total, shows round complete summary

stories.title: As a player, I want a live team leaderboard showing rankings vs par, so that I can track my team's position.

acs.text: Teams ranked by cumulative best-ball score vs par
Top 20 teams shown by default
"Your Team ★" pinned with green highlight (even outside top 20)
"Thru" column shows holes completed per team
Scores update in real-time via Supabase Realtime

stories.title: As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL that works without login, so that I can follow the tournament.

acs.text: /live/cibc-granite-ridge-2026 loads without authentication
Same leaderboard UI without "Your Team" pin
LIVE badge displayed in header
Sponsor logos visible below header

stories.title: As a sponsor, I want my logo displayed on the leaderboard, so that I get visibility.

acs.text: Sponsor logos fetched from sponsors table
Displayed in admin-set order below header
Visible on both authenticated and public leaderboard

stories.title: As an admin, I want a sidebar navigation with FDgolf + AI/Run branding, so that I can access all admin functions.

acs.text: Sidebar shows all 7 admin sections
FDgolf + AI/Run at top, First Derivative at bottom
Active section highlighted with green border
Non-admin users redirected away

stories.title: As an admin, I want to configure tournament details, so that the event information is correct.

acs.text: Edit tournament name, date, venue, format, slug
Copy public leaderboard URL to clipboard
Change tournament status (setup/active/completed)

stories.title: As an admin, I want to edit hole par values and pin GPS coordinates, so that scoring is accurate.

acs.text: 18-row table showing hole number, par, handicap, pin lat/lng
Inline editing of par and GPS values
Changes saved to database on submit

stories.title: As an admin, I want to manage the club list, so that players see the correct clubs.

acs.text: Add, edit, delete clubs
Reorder clubs via sort_order
Activate/deactivate toggle (inactive clubs hidden from players)

stories.title: As an admin, I want to view and edit player details including team assignment, so that registrations are correct.

acs.text: Searchable player table (125 rows)
Edit modal with all player fields + team dropdown
Password reset button sends reset email
Status indicators (active/pending)

stories.title: As an admin, I want to create teams, assign players, and set starting holes, so that foursomes are organized.

acs.text: Create new team with team number and optional name
Search and assign unassigned players to team
Set starting hole per team
"Auto-assign starting holes" distributes teams across 1–18

stories.title: As an admin, I want to override any player's score, so that I can correct errors.

acs.text: Select team → select hole → view individual strokes
Edit stroke count for any player
"Recalculate Best Ball" updates is_best_ball flag
Override logged with admin ID and timestamp
Leaderboard updates immediately after save

stories.title: As an admin, I want to upload sponsor logos and set their display order, so that sponsors are visible on the leaderboard.

acs.text: Upload PNG/SVG logo to Supabase Storage
Set sponsor name and display order
Toggle sponsor visibility
Preview sponsor bar as it appears on leaderboard

stories.title: As an admin, I want players to verify their identity via SMS OTP, so that accounts are secure.

acs.text: 2FA enrollment during registration (optional)
SMS OTP sent via Supabase Auth on login
User can disable 2FA from profile

stories.title: As a player, I want to reset my password via email, so that I can recover access.

acs.text: "Forgot password" link on login page
Reset email sent via Supabase Auth
New password accepted after clicking reset link

tasks.title: Run create-next-app with TypeScript, Tailwind, App Router, src directory
tasks.notes: Use --no-git flag since repo already initialized

tasks.title: Install and initialize shadcn/ui with required components
tasks.notes: Components needed: button, input, label, card, select, dialog, table, badge, dropdown-menu, sheet, tabs, toast

tasks.title: Create Supabase browser and server client helpers
tasks.notes: Follow @supabase/ssr pattern for Next.js App Router

tasks.title: Write and apply database migration with all tables, RLS, and indexes
tasks.notes: 9 tables, enable Realtime on scores table

tasks.title: Write and apply seed SQL for clubs, holes, and tournament
tasks.notes: 21 clubs, 18 holes for Granite Ridge, 1 tournament record

tasks.title: Implement offline sync engine with localStorage queue and auto-flush
tasks.notes: All writes go through sync engine — online or offline. React hook with useSyncExternalStore.

tasks.title: Create AppHeader component (full and compact variants)
tasks.notes: FDgolf + AI/Run gradient icon + "created by AI/Run™" text

tasks.title: Create Next.js middleware with auth session refresh and route protection
tasks.notes: Protect all routes except /login, /register, /live/[slug]

tasks.title: Build registration Step 1 (email/password with Supabase Auth signUp)
Build registration Step 2 (profile form → players table insert)
Build registration Step 3 (team lookup and linking)
tasks.notes: Query teams by team_number, display teammates, update team_id

tasks.title: Build login page with Supabase signInWithPassword
Build player dashboard page
tasks.notes: Server Component fetching player, team, tournament data

tasks.title: Create Google Maps wrapper component with pin and player markers
tasks.notes: Uses @googlemaps/js-api-loader, satellite view, markers for pin and player

tasks.title: Implement GPS capture utility and React hook
tasks.notes: High accuracy, 10s timeout, distance calculation (Haversine)

tasks.title: Build player pills component for team member selection
tasks.notes: Active/waiting/done states, tap to switch, "Enter shot for [name]" semantics

tasks.title: Build club selector dropdown grouped by category
tasks.notes: Fetch active clubs, group by category, sorted by sort_order

tasks.title: Build shot outcome buttons with scoring logic
tasks.notes: In-Play (record), OOB (+1 penalty), Mulligan (discard), Sunk (close hole)

tasks.title: Build round page state machine (capture → outcome → next player loop)
tasks.notes: Integrates map, player pills, club selector, capture button, outcome buttons, sync engine

tasks.title: Implement hole completion detection and Best Ball Edge Function
tasks.notes: Supabase Edge Function calculates strokes, marks is_best_ball, broadcasts via Realtime

tasks.title: Build hole summary screen
tasks.notes: Show each player's strokes, highlight best ball, score vs par

tasks.title: Implement next-hole navigation with wraparound
tasks.notes: Starting hole 10 → plays 10,11,...18,1,2,...9. Detect round complete after 18 holes.

tasks.title: Build authenticated leaderboard with Realtime subscription
tasks.notes: Uses get_leaderboard RPC, Supabase Realtime channel on scores table

tasks.title: Build public leaderboard page at /live/[slug]
tasks.notes: No auth, fetches tournament by slug, same leaderboard UI, LIVE badge

tasks.title: Build sponsor banner component
tasks.notes: Fetch active sponsors ordered by display_order, display logos

tasks.title: Build admin sidebar navigation and layout
tasks.notes: Branding, nav items, role check, First Derivative logo footer

tasks.notes: Edit name, date, venue, format, slug, status. Copy public URL button.

tasks.title: Build club management admin page

tasks.notes: Team list, create/edit modal, player search, auto-assign starting holes

tasks.title: Build sponsor management admin page
tasks.notes: Upload to Supabase Storage, reorder, toggle visibility, live preview

bugs.title: E2E TC-0049 selector matched pencil button instead of name input
E2E TC-0056 referenced non-existent "team number" form field
Sunk shot written twice — SyncEngine queue + direct Supabase upsert

recentActivity.summary: Full agentic pipeline (Conductor → Pixel → Lens/Sentinel/Circuit → PR) executed against the approved design spec `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-feature-completion-design.md`.; ; **6 features implemented** on `feature/feature-completion-2026-06-11` (PR #3 → develop):

**Local Supabase instance** — `supabase/config.toml` created with port offset +20 (54341–54349) to coexist with other local Supabase projects on OrbStack Docker. Instance running as `supabase_*_FDgolf_CodeMie`.; **Migration 005 registered** — policies were applied by `supabase start` but not tracked; inserted row into `supabase_migrations.schema_migrations` manually.; **`.env.local` updated** — `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` changed from port 54321 → 54341.

**Mapbox migration** — replaced `@googlemaps/js-api-loader` with `mapbox-gl` + `react-map-gl`.;   - `src/components/hole-map.tsx` rewritten: `react-map-gl/mapbox`, satellite-v9 style, `interactive={false}`, shot markers;   - `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` replaces `NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY` in `.env.local.example`

**CLAUDE.md** — Rewritten from PlanVisualizer boilerplate into a project-specific reference. Added: commands table, architecture with route groups, data flow, lib modules, Supabase migrations, non-obvious technical decisions, testing section, git quick reference, Session Close Checklist (8 items), PlanVisualizer dashboard section.; **docs/ARCHITECTURE.md** — Created comprehensive technical documentation. 9 Mermaid diagrams: system overview, route groups, auth middleware flowchart, magic link sequence, ER diagram (9 tables), shot recording sequence, offline sync state machine, real-time leaderboard sequence, 4 user journeys.; **AGENTS.md** — Fully rewritten and expanded. Now includes: BLAST phases (Blueprint/Link/Architect/Stylize/Trigger), Migration Tracking, Prompt Logging, User Profile as Design Constraint, Design System Compliance, API Versioning (/api/v1/), Concurrency Safety, Orchestration Engine, File & Deliverable Structure.

**RELEASE_PLAN.md synced** — corrected story statuses (Python regex had matched across block boundaries via Dependencies fields);   - 32/37 stories marked Done; remaining Planned: US-0004 (Vercel), US-0021 (edit shot), US-0023 (hole summary), US-0036 (2FA), US-0037 (password reset); **Dashboard regenerated** — `npm run plan:generate` → `docs/plan-status.html` now shows 86.5% progress (was showing 0%)
